mapper.select: SELECT cm.name, cm.cover, cm.category_name, cm.credit, cm.content, m.name AS material_name FROM credit_mall cm LEFT JOIN material m ON cm.material_id = m.id WHERE cm.id = #{id}

SELECT cm.id, cm.name, cm.state AS status, cm.cover, cm.credit, cm.sale_num AS exchangedCount, cm.view_num AS viewCount, IFNULL(IFNULL(cm.edit_time, cm.add_time), '1970-01-01 00:00:00') AS lastUpdateTime, cm.school_id AS schoolId, IFNULL(o.name, '未分配') AS schoolName, IFNULL(cm.category_name, '未分类') AS categoryName FROM credit_mall cm LEFT JOIN org o ON cm.school_id = o.id
cm.deleted = 0
AND cm.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND cm.state = #{state}
ORDER BY IFNULL(cm.edit_time, cm.add_time) DESC, cm.id DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE credit_mall SET deleted = 1 WHERE id IN
#{id}
